elements.original_description: A person standing at a crossroads, looking down at a small coin on the ground while a glowing golden path leading to a distant treasure chest fades into the background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph, cinematic lighting, a person standing at a crossroads, looking down at a small coin on the ground, a glowing golden path leading to a distant treasure chest fading into the background, symbolic of missing long-term opportunities, soft bokeh, sharp focus on the person and coin, high resolution, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks, professional composition.
